definition: A person who competes for a title, prize, or position; one who has a realistic chance of winning.
example: Every champion was once a contender who refused to give up.
speech: Rocky to his son Rocky Jr.

definition: Steady persistence in a course of action, a purpose, or a state, especially in spite of difficulties, obstacles, or discouragement.
example: Going in one more round when you don't think you can. That's what makes all the difference in your life.
speech: Rocky to his son Rocky Jr.

definition: The capacity to recover quickly from difficulties; toughness; the ability to spring back into shape.
example: It ain't about how hard you hit. It's about how hard you can get hit and keep moving forward.
speech: Rocky to his son Rocky Jr.

definition: Courage and resolve; strength of character; firmness of mind or spirit.
example: The world ain't all sunshine and rainbows... You, me, or nobody is gonna hit as hard as life. But it ain't about how hard you hit.
speech: Rocky to his son Rocky Jr.

definition: Courage, spirit, or enthusiasm; the emotional or moral core that drives determination and passion.
example: It ain't about how hard you hit. It's about how hard you can get hit and keep moving forward.
speech: Rocky to his son Rocky Jr.

definition: A competitor thought to have little chance of winning a fight or contest; one who is expected to lose.
example: I can't beat him, but I can go the distance. If I can go the distance, I'll know for the first time in my life that I weren't just another bum from the neighborhood.

definition: Difficulties; misfortune; a state of hardship or affliction.
example: The world ain't all sunshine and rainbows. It's a very mean and nasty place and I don't care how tough you are it will beat you to your knees and keep you there permanently if you let it.
speech: Rocky to his son Rocky Jr.

definition: A person who has defeated or surpassed all rivals in a competition; one who fights or argues for a cause or on behalf of others.
example: Every champion was once a contender who refused to give up.
speech: Rocky to his son Rocky Jr.
